nasb.text: Remember Your congregation, which You have purchased of old, Which You have redeemed to be the tribe of Your inheritance; And this Mount Zion, where You have dwelt.

esv.text: Remember your congregation, which you have purchased of old, which you have redeemed to be the tribe of your heritage! Remember Mount Zion, where you have dwelt.

cnv.text: 求你記念你在古時買贖的會眾， 就是你贖回作你產業的民族； 求你記念你所居住的錫安山。

ccb.text: 求你眷顾你在古时所救赎的子民， 你拣选为产业的族类， 求你眷顾你所居住的锡安山。

csbs.text: 求你记念你古时就买赎了的会众， 就是你所赎回作你继业的支派； 求你记念你所安居的锡安山。
